allow: Bash(git commit -q -m 'Scaffold corpus, benchmark, and v1 passthrough baseline *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'v2: plain base64 \(anchor — confirms ~1.35x expansion\) *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'v4: pre-shared deflate dictionary -> 0.86x avg, 825/1000 wins *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'v5: prefix table \(1 byte\) + dict-deflate -> 0.78x *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'v6: prefix + brotli \(control\) -- 0.84x, loses to v5 *)
